title: Reference
description: This section collects source level and configuration references for Niamoto. Use it when you need the current command surface, plugin contracts, YAML boundaries, database shape, or preview API.
html:
Reference

This section collects source-level and configuration references for Niamoto. Use it when you need the current command surface, plugin contracts, YAML boundaries, database shape, or preview API.

Start here

  • api/modules.rst: autogenerated Python API reference
  • cli-commands.md: current CLI entry points and live help
  • configuration-guide.md: boundaries between config.yml, import.yml, transform.yml, export.yml, and deploy.yml
  • database-schema.md: persisted tables and metadata registries
  • gui-preview-api.md: desktop preview endpoints
  • transform-plugins.md: how the GUI reads transformer schemas
  • widgets-and-transform-workflow.md: how widgets connect data, transforms, and rendering
